structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2024-12-20 Investor Update: Bayview DSCR
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2024-12-20 15:13:24-07:00

	
		
 


Investor Update: Bayview DSCR
NCM-P-2024-12-20

 

 

ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Capital Markets is excited to announce the addition of Bayview’s DSCR program.  This is a delegated jumbo option; all underwriting is done by NOVA.  

 

Program Highlights

*	Up to 2.5MM Loan Amount
*	Purchases: Up to 80% LTV
*	Cash-out: Up to 75% LTV
*	Minimum 660 Credit Score
*	Eligible Property Types

	*	1-4 unit residential investment properties
	*	Attached and Detached
	*	PUDs
	*	Condominiums

		*	warrantable & non-warrantable

*	Fixed Rate 30-year term
*	10-year I/0 with loan fully amortizing over remaining 20 years

 

 

With the addition of Bayview’s DSCR program, along with Deephaven’s DSCR option, we will be sunsetting the NOVA DSCR program.

 

 

Important Notes:

*	Detailed guidelines for Bayview and Deephaven programs are available on NOVAnet.
*	All DSCR loans must be locked prior to submission to Underwriting.
*	Bayview Blanket DSCR and business entity loans are not available.

 

 

Attachments:

*	Product Guidelines

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting (jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product (ProductDept@novahomeloans.com <mailto:ProductDept@novahomeloans.com> ) 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk (lock.desk@novahomeloans.com <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> )

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **
